summary: Hardened TerminalPane.tsx: deferred/guarded xterm open()+fit() until container is mounted+sized (kills the syncScrollArea undefined-dimensions crash), flip to 'disconnected' state on WS error/unclean close (1006) and stop driving xterm, and wrapped the pane in a local error boundary with retry. Added TerminalPane.test.tsx repro (5 tests). tsc 0 errors, scoped tests pass.
